description_long: This object is a small, elongated vessel with a spout at one end and a curved, ornate handle at the other, resembling an ancient oil lamp rather than a modern rifle. The body is rounded and slightly flattened, with a circular lid on top that features a small, pointed finial. The spout is narrow and tapers to a rounded tip, while the handle arches upward and is textured with ridges. The surface appears weathered and patinated, suggesting it is made of aged metal, possibly bronze or brass. The object rests on a circular base, giving it stability and a display-like quality.
description: A weathered, metal vessel with a spout, ornate handle, and circular lid, resembling an ancient oil lamp. The surface is patinated and the object sits on a round base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, curved handle, and spout, with the circular base visible underneath.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the top lid, finial, and the open spout, with the handle arching upward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the handle and spout, with the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the handle's texture and the vessel's rounded back, with the spout receding into the distance.
